2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [10] 2026.03.23
C77 Ruy Lopez, four knights (Tarrasch) variation

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bb5 a6 4.Ba4 Nf6 5.Nc3 b5 6.Bb3 Be7 7.d3 O-O 8.a3 d6 9.Nd5 Rb8 10.O-O h6 11.h3 Re8 12.Be3 Bf8 13.Nd2 Nxd5 14.Bxd5 Ne7 15.Bb3 Ng6 16.a4 Be6 17.Bxe6 Rxe6 18.axb5 axb5 19.Ra6 Qc8 20.Ra7 Ra8 21.Qa1 Rxa7 22.Qxa7 d5 23.Qa5 d4 24.Qxb5 Rb6 25.Qc4 Rxb2 26.Nb3 dxe3 27.fxe3 Qe6 28.Qxc7 Be7 29.Ra1 Nh4 30.Kh2 Qg6 31.Rg1 Bg5 32.Qc8+ Kh7 33.Qc5 Qf6
